isi.lyrics:
Lyric Crush - FREQUENCY (Feat. Loco)

Romanization

geureolssahan mareul ibedaga mun nomdeul geotman beonjireureuhae
Watching your ’gram, they hit your Dms
hositamtam neol noriryeogo hae

urin matchwojyeo isseo gateun jupasu
Give me your sign, you’re my hot spot
nacheoreom nega wonhaneun ge jeoldae mwonji molla

I feel you next to me, oh, tonight
Can’t explain it, just feels right
amudo mot kkieo mal an haedo neukkyeo
We’re locked in the same frequency

I think about you all the time
uri dulmani inneun paradise
amudo mot kkieo mal an haedo neukkyeo
We’re locked in L.O.V.E

Everyday neol saenggakhae
Damn girl, what you do to me
It’s a link, sync, feels surreal
Same frequency
amudo mot kkieo mal an haedo neukkyeo
We’re locked in L.O.V.E

Stop
numbicheun Telepathy
ne moksorineun ttoryeothae
ne moksori ppaegon da bangeumhaji

maeil nuneul gameumyeon tteojyeo
hetgalliji kkumi anin geotdo
LOCKED IN umjigiji bappi urin
gateun seone isseo yodongchineun geotdo

kkiwo matchun ge anirago nae jupasupasu
mitgijiga ana ttokgataseo
amhoreul pureobolge neoui HOT SPOT
yeollyeobeorijana soni dajamaja

haneureun boksunga gataseo on my way that way
jam kkaena jana kkaena it’s a way VACAY
urin nappeugeman hae L O V wait wait
Gonna Eat eat eat that way

gyaene uimi eopseodo urin numman seoro chyeodabwado kkeudeokgeoryeo
paran mulgyeolcheoreom ijen nuga wado mot kkyeodeureo
neo ppaegon jeombu blurred

I feel you next to me, oh, tonight
Can’t explain it, just feels right
amudo mot kkieo mal an haedo neukkyeo
We’re locked in the same frequency

I think about you all the time
uri dulmani inneun paradise
amudo mot kkieo mal an haedo neukkyeo
We’re locked in L.O.V.E

Everyday neol saenggakhae
Damn girl, what you do to me
It’s a link, sync, feels surreal
Same frequency
amudo mot kkieo mal an haedo neukkyeo
We’re locked in L.O.V.E

machimnae neoui sumgyeori nareul kkot pige hae
kkumsogeseo geuryeotdeon geu numbicheuro nal bomyeon
sigando sumeul meomchwo baby

Everyday neol saenggakhae
Damn girl, what you do to me
It’s a link, sync, feels surreal
Same frequency (siganeun sumeul meomchugo)
amudo mot kkieo mal an haedo neukkyeo
We’re locked in L.O.V.E


Hangeul

그럴싸한 말을 입에다가 문 놈들 겉만 번지르르해
Watching your ’gram, they hit your Dms
호시탐탐 널 노리려고 해

우린 맞춰져 있어 같은 주파수
Give me your sign, you’re my hot spot
나처럼 네가 원하는 게 절대 뭔지 몰라

I feel you next to me, oh, tonight
Can’t explain it, just feels right
아무도 못 끼어 말 안 해도 느껴
We’re locked in the same frequency

I think about you all the time
우리 둘만이 있는 paradise
아무도 못 끼어 말 안 해도 느껴
We’re locked in L.O.V.E

Everyday 널 생각해
Damn girl, what you do to me
It’s a link, sync, feels surreal
Same frequency
아무도 못 끼어 말 안 해도 느껴
We’re locked in L.O.V.E

Stop
눈빛은 Telepathy
네 목소리는 또렷해
네 목소리 빼곤 다 방음하지

매일 눈을 감으면 떠져
헷갈리지 꿈이 아닌 것도
LOCKED IN 움직이지 바삐 우린
같은 선에 있어 요동치는 것도

끼워 맞춘 게 아니라고 내 주파수파수
믿기지가 않아 똑같아서
암호를 풀어볼게 너의 HOT SPOT
열려버리잖아 손이 닿자마자

하늘은 복숭아 같아서 on my way that way
잠 깨나 자나 깨나 it’s a way VACAY
우린 나쁘게만 해 L O V wait wait
Gonna Eat eat eat that way

걔네 의미 없어도 우린 눈만 서로 쳐다봐도 끄덕거려
파란 물결처럼 이젠 누가 와도 못 껴들어
너 빼곤 전부 blurred

I feel you next to me, oh, tonight
Can’t explain it, just feels right
아무도 못 끼어 말 안 해도 느껴
We’re locked in the same frequency

I think about you all the time
우리 둘만이 있는 paradise
아무도 못 끼어 말 안 해도 느껴
We’re locked in L.O.V.E

Everyday 널 생각해
Damn girl, what you do to me
It’s a link, sync, feels surreal
Same frequency
아무도 못 끼어 말 안 해도 느껴
We’re locked in L.O.V.E

마침내 너의 숨결이 나를 꽃 피게 해
꿈속에서 그렸던 그 눈빛으로 날 보면
시간도 숨을 멈춰 baby

Everyday 널 생각해
Damn girl, what you do to me
It’s a link, sync, feels surreal
Same frequency (시간은 숨을 멈추고)
아무도 못 끼어 말 안 해도 느껴
We’re locked in L.O.V.E

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Crush - 2-5-1

Romanization

nega sumeul naeswil ttae
gureum wikkaji yeah
deurimasilge like kkeutmaritgi

cheonggugeseo deullineun sorireul bontteo
mandeun i mellodineun magnolia
Pillow talk, ne pumeun naui simjang
gyaenen nollyeo uril bomyeo
romaentikkomidi, eollerikkolleri
How many songs bloom between you and me
Who cares, my love is real

neoui sumsorin 2-5-1
neoui sumgyeollo writing love note
neoui sum naemsaega nan neomu jo
I’m makin’ love songs 2-5-1

neoui sumgwa nae sum saie tempo
Slidin’ right into your falsetto
pagodeulgo sipeo all night long
I’m makin’ love songs 2-5-1

nuneul gamgo seeobwa
2,5,3,6, is 1,4,3
We found the key

neoui sumsorin 2-5-1
The way I love you like 2-5-1

2-5-1
2-5-1
2-5-1

I’m makin’ love songs 2-5-1

2-5-1
2-5-1
2-5
2-5
2-5-1


Hangeul

네가 숨을 내쉴 때
구름 위까지 yeah
들이마실게 like 끝말잇기

천국에서 들리는 소리를 본떠
만든 이 멜로디는 magnolia
Pillow talk, 네 품은 나의 심장
걔넨 놀려 우릴 보며
로맨틱코미디, 얼레리꼴레리
How many songs bloom between you and me
Who cares, my love is real

Slidin’ right into your falsetto

눈을 감고 세어봐
2,5,3,6, is 1,4,3

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Crush - UP ALL NITE (Feat. SUMIN)

Romanization

Lost in the dance
nae sumi daraolla neowa daasseul ttae
i bimirui muni yeollimyeon we don’t delay
yegodo eopsi nan sumgyeol sairo blend
Uh getting into something

Up all night Got me up all night
Up all night Got me up all night
Up all night Got me up all night

So tell me how you want it (Tell me how you want it)
nameun bameun gati chaewobollae (Back to my apartment)
gin yaegineun binggeul dolgo biseuthanikka
Girl your eyes undress me
‘Boutta lose my patience

Oh wanna see how your garden grows
Girl we can take it slow,
Oh wanna see all your flowers in bloom

Up all night Got me up all night
Up all night Got me up all night
Up all night Got me up all night

Gimme that look
Gimme that time
Gimme that mood
Then I’ll be fine
Let me just tease
You’re gonna drip all night

You don’t text me goodnight
Ain’t no “maybe” tonight, ain’t no second try now
woo woo ah

Your hoodie’s cute, now take it off smooth
And if you talk too long, I’ll change the groove
neutji malgo daeum jangmyeoneul mandeulja
chimmugeul kkeunko i bameul yeoreo
